message:
feat(esm-cjs): expand ESM/CJS parity evidence with compatibility disposition, remediation guidance, and extended specimen coverage

Add new types to the ESM/CJS parity evidence module:

- EsmCjsCompatibilityDisposition enum (Supported/Degraded/Unsupported):
  classifies the compatibility status of an ESM/CJS pair with Display,
  as_str, FromStr, and serde support for all three variants.

- EsmCjsRemediationGuidance struct: pairs a guidance_code identifier
  with a human-readable message to provide actionable remediation steps
  when parity violations are detected.

These types enable richer evidence capture in the parity analysis
pipeline, allowing downstream consumers to distinguish between fully
compatible, degraded, and unsupported module pairs, and to surface
specific remediation advice.

Enrichment integration and integration test suites expanded to cover
the new types and their serialization roundtrips.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
